channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Prompt Engineering
channel.description: Latest Prompt Engineering news in Context Engineering

item.title: Can Small Models Reason About Legal Documents? A Comparative Study
item.description: arXiv:2603.25944v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models show promise for legal applications, but deploying frontier models raises concerns about cost, latency, and data privacy. We evaluate whether sub-10B parameter models can serve as practical alternatives by testing nine models acr...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> API, reasoning, large language model, arxiv, few-shot | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: When Chain-of-Thought Backfires: Evaluating Prompt Sensitivity in Medical Language Models
item.description: arXiv:2603.25960v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in medical settings, yet their sensitivity to prompt formatting remains poorly characterized. We evaluate MedGemma (4B and 27B parameters) on MedMCQA (4,183 questions) and PubMedQA (1,000 question...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, large language model, few-shot, example, CoT | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: CADSmith: Multi-Agent CAD Generation with Programmatic Geometric Validation
item.description: arXiv:2603.26512v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Existing methods for text-to-CAD generation either operate in a single pass with no geometric verification or rely on lossy visual feedback that cannot resolve dimensional errors. We present CADSmith, a multi-agent pipeline that generates CadQuery cod...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> library, API, arxiv, zero-shot, vision | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Context-Engineering - "Context engineering is the delicate art and science of filling the context window with just the right information for the next step." — Andrej Karpathy. A frontier, first-principles handbook inspired by Karpathy and 3Blue1Brown for moving beyond prompt engineering to the wider discipline of context design, orchestration, and optimization.
item.description: "Context engineering is the delicate art and science of filling the context window with just the right information for the next step." — Andrej Karpathy. A frontier, first-principles handbook inspired by Karpathy and 3Blue1Brown for moving beyond prompt engineering to the wider discipline of context design, orchestration, and optimization.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context window, prompt, context, prompt engineering | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Claude-Code-Everything-You-Need-to-Know - The ultimate all-in-one guide to mastering Claude Code. From setup, prompt engineering, commands, hooks, workflows, automation, and integrations, to MCP servers, tools, and the BMAD method—packed with step-by-step tutorials, real-world examples, and expert strategies to make this the global go-to repo for Claude mastery.
item.description: The ultimate all-in-one guide to mastering Claude Code. From setup, prompt engineering, commands, hooks, workflows, automation, and integrations, to MCP servers, tools, and the BMAD method—packed with step-by-step tutorials, real-world examples, and expert strategies to make this the global go-to repo for Claude mastery.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> example, tool, prompt engineering, step-by-step, prompt | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: AlphaCodium - Official implementation for the paper: "Code Generation with AlphaCodium: From Prompt Engineering to Flow Engineering""
item.description: Official implementation for the paper: "Code Generation with AlphaCodium: From Prompt Engineering to Flow Engineering""<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> paper, prompt, prompt engineering | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>

item.title: optillm - Optimizing inference proxy for LLMs
